item.title: MA Budget: Community College SUCCESS Fund (7100-4002)
item.description: Anchor page for tracking SUCCESS language, funding, and wraparound-support intent through the budget process.

item.title: Headlines
item.description: Commentary: Workforce Pell: Governance & opportunity State Higher Education Executive Officers Association (blog) State higher education agencies bring significant assets to Workforce Pell implementation, including convening authority, subject matter expertise and robust data and analytical... The post Headlines first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: The college transfer generation
item.description: For decades, students transferring between colleges was a side road in American higher education. Today, it’s one of the system’s main highways. The National Student Clearinghouse Research Center reports that nearly 1.2 million students, or... The post The college transfer generation first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: Building AI Initiatives with Bottom-Up Champions
item.description: Driven by a bottom-up partnership between the Faculty Center for Teaching and Learning and the Division of Digital Learning, the University of Central Florida established an evolving campus infrastructure of policies, training, and a national conference to guide the ethical and effective integration of generative AI into teaching and learning.
